args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01';

args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate FROM "Order" o WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate FROM "Order" o WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) as CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) as CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE replace(ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01';

args.query: SELECT oi.OrderId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id WHERE oi.OrderId='801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oi.OrderId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id WHERE oi.OrderId='801Wt00000PHRYWIA5';
